name: balance_attestation_verifier
description: LEZ gate-state program for LP-0005. Current Workable implementation admits a presenter once per (gate, nullifier) from a host-verified outer journal; the deployed program does not verify a RISC Zero receipt on-chain in the current local LEZ build.

instructions.name: register_presenter
instructions.description: Register a presenter account by writing the presenter's 32-byte BIP-340 x-only pubkey into account data and claiming the account for this verifier program. Admit later derives accepted_presenter_id from this stored pubkey.

accounts.name: presenter
accounts.notes: Must be uninitialized; claimed by the verifier program.

instructions.name: init_gate
instructions.description: Initialize a fresh gate state account pinned to a (chain_id, verifier_id, gate_id, threshold) tuple. The expected_inner_image_id is also recorded so future admit calls can reject journals with a different inner circuit.

instructions.name: admit
instructions.description: Admit the presenter from a host-verified outer journal. Current deployed program steps: (1) outer journal version + inner_image_id match the gate state, (2) gate_context_id matches the gate, (3) accepted_threshold exactly equals gate.threshold, (4) accepted_context_nullifier is not already in admitted_nullifiers, (5) presenter LEZ tx-signing account hashes to accepted_presenter_id. Receipt verification must happen before submission in CLI/SDK until LEZ exposes receipt-bound admission for this path.

args.name: outer_journal
args.notes: Borsh-encoded LezGateJournal. Must be produced only after host-side attestation_verifier::verify_envelope / prove_lez_gate checks pass.

accounts.name: presenter
accounts.notes: LEZ account whose hash must equal outer_journal.accepted_presenter_id.

types.name: BalanceAttestationJournal
types.description: Inner journal committed by the balance-attestation circuit. Mirrors attestation_core::BalanceAttestationJournal byte-for-byte.

types.name: BalanceAttestationEnvelope
types.description: Off-chain transport envelope. The current on-chain admit() does NOT consume this directly — CLI/SDK verifies it before submitting a Borsh LezGateJournal to the deployed program.

fields.name: presenter_pubkey
fields.notes: BIP-340 x-only Schnorr pubkey. Off-chain only.

fields.name: presentation_challenge
fields.notes: Verifier/session challenge signed by the presenter. Off-chain only.

fields.name: presenter_signature
fields.notes: BIP-340 Schnorr sig over presentation_digest(journal.digest(), presentation_challenge). Off-chain only.

types.name: LezGateJournal
types.description: Journal committed by the outer lez_balance_gate guest and/or host-verified adapter. Decoded by admit() and compared against gate state.

encoding.notes: CLI tooling reads/writes JSON; the LEZ runtime serializes program instructions/account data as Borsh V1. The deployed admit instruction receives a Borsh LezGateJournal, not receipt bytes. Off-chain envelopes still carry serde_json-encoded risc0_zkvm::Receipt for transport; verifiers deserialize and call .verify() before any LEZ submission.
